name: getYoutube
description: Fetch YouTube video transcripts or search YouTube. For mode='transcript': fetches the transcript in pages. The first call returns rows[0..N-1]; if has_more=true, call again with start_ctx_id=next_start_ctx_id to get the next page — repeat until has_more=false. For mode='search': searches YouTube via the Data API.
policyHint: When the user asks about a YouTube video, wants a transcript, or asks to search YouTube, use this tool. If has_more=true in the response, always call again with start_ctx_id=next_start_ctx_id to retrieve remaining transcript segments before answering.

mode.description: transcript = fetch transcript (paginated); search = YouTube search via Data API.

metaOnly.description: If true, return only video metadata without fetching the transcript (requires valid googleApiKey).

videoUrl.description: Full YouTube URL or 11-character video ID. Required when mode='transcript'.

userPrompt.description: Optional: if provided, runs a focused QA over the transcript instead of a generic summary.

start_ctx_id.description: Pagination offset (item index). Omit or set to 0 for the first page. Use the next_start_ctx_id value from the previous response to fetch the next page.
